name: LiquidityPenaltyHook
description: A hook that disincentivizes Just-in-Time (JIT) liquidity attacks by penalizing fee collection for liquidity added and removed within a configurable block window. Fees are withheld during the `blockNumberOffset` period and any collected fees are donated to LPs in range at the time of removal. Penalty decreases linearly from 100% at time of addition to 0% after the offset period.
whenToUse: Use when you want to protect long-term liquidity providers from JIT arbitrageurs who briefly add liquidity to capture fees during large swaps. This hook encourages sustainable liquidity provision by penalizing short-term liquidity flash lending strategies.
